text:
IBM_X3250M4_bsd13] ~# pciconf -lv pcib3
pcib3@pci0:0:28:0:      class=0x060400 rev=0xb5 hdr=0x01 vendor=0x8086 device=0x1c10 subvendor=0x1014 subdevice=0x3a40
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = '6 Series/C200 Series Chipset Family PCI Express Root Port 1'
    class      = bridge
    subclass   = PCI-PCI
